config.stacksizeadjuster.title: Stack Size Adjuster
config.stacksizeadjuster.option.limit_64: Limit for items that normally stack to 64. Default: 64. (Recommended: 79,536,431 or lower to prevent Shulker Box overflows.)
config.stacksizeadjuster.option.limit_16: Limit for items that normally stack to 16. Default: 16. (Recommended: 79,536,431 or lower to prevent Shulker Box overflows.)
Limit for items that normally do not stack. Default: 1. (Recommended: 79,536,431 or lower to prevent Shulker Box overflows.)
config.stacksizeadjuster.option.warning: ⚠️ WARNING: Do you really want to set the value to %d? Setting stack sizes above 79,536,431 is highly likely to cause total Shulker Box counts to overflow the 2.14 billion integer limit and delete your items! 79,536,431 or lower is strongly recommended.
gamerule.stack-size-adjuster.items_64_li: Maximum stack size for items that naturally stack to 64. WARNING: Keep under 79,536,431 to prevent Shulker Box integer overflows.
gamerule.stack-size-adjuster.items_16_li: Maximum stack size for items that naturally stack to 16. WARNING: Keep under 79,536,431 to prevent Shulker Box integer overflows.
gamerule.stack-size-adjuster.items_1_lim: Maximum stack size for items that naturally stack to 1. WARNING: Keep under 79,536,431 to prevent Shulker Box integer overflows.
